resolution_note: ISS ISS-1132 closed: EXP-396 integrated: Section 4.6 Row 2 updated to reflect 10/12/1 prospective_confirmed count as of 2026-05-16. Original 10-vs-9 gap credited as closed; new predictions.html-banner-vs-wins-page gap (12. Closed by: expansion-integration.
rationale: This escalate-to-analyst-* file was created by analyst-baby on 2026-05-13/14 to flag an item it could not handle (too complex for Sonnet). The work has since been resolved through one of three paths: (a) analyst-Opus picked up the item via PROP-029 safety net or tracker entry, authored an EXP, and the EXP was integrated; (b) decider closed the ISS directly via patch + verify; (c) baby itself returned and found the work OBE (already done by a parallel patch). This tombstone supersedes the original escalation file content. No agent should treat this as a pending escalation. FUSE-only orphans (file deleted from git on 2026-05-17 but FUSE cannot unlink).
redirect: Track resolution via monitor/decisions/open-issues.json or monitor/decisions/closed-issues.json for the iss_id above.
